name: Favorite Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp apricot glaze (from 11-oz jar of apricot preserves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Combine pumpkin, sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, ginger, nutmeg, eggs, milk, 1/4 cup bourbon, and 3/4 cup whipping cream in a large bowl. Mix until well blended.
3. Paint the pastry shell with apricot glaze from an 11-oz jar of apricot preserves.
4. Pour the pumpkin mixture into the shell.
5. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake 30-40 minutes longer, or until filling has set. Test by inserting a knife 1 inch from the center; if it comes out clean, the pie is done.
6. Cool until lukewarm.
7. Combine brown sugar, melted butter, whipping cream, salt, and chopped pecans in a bowl. Spread evenly over the filling.
8. Decorate with pecan halves.
9. Broil 3 inches from low heat until the surface begins to bubble. Watch carefully to avoid scorching.
10. To serve, whip the cream, fold in bourbon to taste, and serve with warm pie.
